query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meditation_sessions (
    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    category VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'mindfulness',
    frequency FLOAT DEFAULT 432.0,
    frequency_name VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'Solfeggio 432Hz',
    duration_minutes INT DEFAULT 10,
    audio_url TEXT,
    image_url TEXT,
    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
    play_count INT DEFAULT 0,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

INSERT INTO meditation_sessions (title, description, category, frequency, frequency_name, duration_minutes) VALUES
    ('Deep Healing Meditation', 'Solfeggio frequency healing session for deep restoration', 'healing', 528, 'Love Frequency 528Hz', 15),
    ('Morning Mindfulness', 'Start your day with centered awareness and intention', 'mindfulness', 432, 'Universal Harmony 432Hz', 10),
    ('Stress Relief', 'Release tension and find inner peace', 'stress-relief', 396, 'Liberation 396Hz', 20),
    ('Sleep Preparation', 'Gentle frequency session to prepare for restful sleep', 'sleep', 174, 'Foundation 174Hz', 30),
    ('Creative Flow', 'Open your creative channels with sacred frequencies', 'creativity', 639, 'Connection 639Hz', 15),
    ('Chakra Balancing', 'Full chakra alignment using Solfeggio scale', 'chakra', 741, 'Expression 741Hz', 25),
    ('Focus & Clarity', 'Sharpen mental focus with theta wave frequencies', 'focus', 852, 'Intuition 852Hz', 10),
    ('Ancestral Connection', 'Connect with ancestral wisdom through sacred sound', 'spiritual', 963, 'Divine 963Hz', 20);
